patch.value: Deliver the PRD post-v0.1 search roadmap: advanced relevance tuning, adapter optimization, provider extensibility, eval harness
Deliver the PRD post-v0.1 search roadmap: advanced relevance tuning, adapter optimization, provider extensibility, eval harness
Higher-quality, configurable retrieval for large corpora and agents
Keyword and semantic search verified against the eval harness golden set; provider and adapter values auto-normalize; inline field-query syntax documented.

## Charter
Living capability epic for the PRD post-v0.1 search roadmap: keyword + semantic retrieval, relevance tuning, provider extensibility (ollama/BM25-offline/custom via extensions), vector-store adapters, and the pm eval harness.

## Scope
- In: search ranking (exact-ID rank, field:value inline syntax, --highlight), semantic refresh pipeline, embeddings storage/GC, provider/adapter config normalization, eval datasets.
- Out: generic storage (pm-o2kc), search-related SDK capability plumbing (pm-ugqx).

## Status
20 closed children (BM25 offline provider + eval harness PR#314, inline field:value syntax PR#290, exact-ID ranking PR#282, background semantic refresh PR#87). Open as a living backlog — no open children at 2026-07-04. Related open work parked elsewhere by design: pm-28cf (search config normalization) sits under pm-8jdc because the defect is config-layer normalization, not retrieval.
